'''Saurton''' was a [[Color/Legends|yellow]] [[Star/Legends|star]] in the [[Saurton system]],<ref name="PoG1" /> located in the [[Trax sector/Legends|Trax sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by two [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] belts, the [[Kanawyn Belt]] and the [[Greawyn Belt]]. A single [[Planet/Legends|planet]], [[Essowyn]]—the cratered [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Saurton]] [[Species/Legends|species]]—orbited it between the asteroid belts.<ref name="PoG1" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1991-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume One]]''
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
